pr_title: SDLC-43: Fix case-insensitive origin flight search
pr_body:
## Summary
Fix flight search so origin airport filtering is case-insensitive. Queries like `origin=ath` will now match flights stored with uppercase airport codes such as `ATH`.

## Changes
- Normalize origin filtering in `backend/app/services/flight_service.py`
- Add regression coverage in `backend/app/tests/test_flight_service.py`

## Validation
- Added/updated tests for lower-case and uppercase origin search
- Confirmed other search behavior remains unchanged

## Jira
SDLC-43
reviewer_summary: Draft PR opened and awaiting human review.
